backstory.original: The evil magic user Skylla borrows her terrible power from none other than the infamous Arch-hag and Mother of Witches, Baba Yaga. An ally of convenience, Skylla lives only for the pursuit of power and acclaim, seeing even her fellow members of the League of Malevolence as tools to be used and discarded when it suits her needs. Skylla confounds her foes with magical trickery, wielding the unpredictable chaos of the Feywild to hypnotize and incapacitate those who stand between her and her goals.
backstory.display: 邪恶魔法使用者斯凯拉的可怕力量来自于臭名昭著的大鬼婆和“女巫之母”——雅加婆婆。作为一个临时的盟友，斯凯拉眼里只有力量和别人对她的赞誉，甚至将“恶念联会”的同伴都视作有需要时可以利用和抛弃的工具。斯凯拉会以魔法诡术迷惑敌人，运用妖精荒野那难以捉摸的混沌之力来催眠那些阻碍她实现自己目标的敌人，使他们失去活动能力，

description.original: Skylla attacks a random enemy with her staff for one hit, and zaps another random enemy for 1 hit.
description.display: 斯凯拉用她的法杖攻击一名随机敌人一次，再电击另一名随机敌人一次。

description.original: Skylla casts Hypnotic Pattern, making enemies take more damage from attacks and briefly stunning them.
description.display: 斯凯拉施放催眠图纹，使受到攻击的敌人承受更多伤害，并短暂眩晕他们。

longDescription.original: Skylla casts Hypnotic Pattern, making enemies take additional BUD-based damage from attacks for the duration. Additionally, enemies are stunned until they take damage.
longDescription.display: 斯凯拉施放催眠图纹，使受到攻击的敌人在效果持续期间额外承受基于基础杀招伤害的伤害。此外，敌人会被眩晕，直到他们受到伤害为止。

description.desc: Skylla increases the damage of all Champions in the column in front of her by $(amount)% for each Champion affected by this ability, stacking multiplicatively.
每有一名勇士受这项技能影响，斯凯拉会使她前列所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Skylla increases the damage of Champions in the column in front of her, with the benefit increasing as the number of buffed Champions increases.
tipText.display: 斯凯拉会提高她前列勇士的伤害，而且有越多的勇士受她的增益影响，其效果就越强。

description.desc: When Skylla attacks an enemy but doesn't defeat it, she casts Faerie Fire on it. Champions deal $amount% additional damage to enemies affected by Faerie Fire.
当斯凯拉攻击一名敌人但没有将其击败时，她会对该敌人施放精灵之火。勇士们会对受精灵之火影响的敌人造成 $amount% 的额外伤害。

tipText.original: Skylla casts Faerie Fire on foes she attacks and can't defeat, making them more vulnerable to subsequent attacks.
tipText.display: 斯凯拉会对她攻击但没能击败的敌人施加精灵之火，使其更容易受到后续攻击的伤害。

description.desc: Other Champions in the party have their ability scores switched: STR with CHA, DEX with INT, and CON with WIS. The effect of Whispers of Baba Yaga is increased by 100% each time the difference between the switched scores is 5 or more, stacking multiplicatively.

effect_keys.per_hero_expr: as_int(hero_id != 169) * (as_int(abs(GetStat(`str`) - GetStat(`cha`)) > 4) + as_int(abs(GetStat(`dex`) - GetStat(`int`)) > 4) + as_int(abs(GetStat(`con`) - GetStat(`wis`)) > 4))

description.desc: 阵型中其他勇士的属性值互换：力量与魅力互换，敏捷与智力互换，体质与感知互换。每当互换的属性值差异大于等于 5 时，“雅加婆婆的低语”的效果提高 100%，以乘算方式堆叠。

effect_keys.per_hero_expr: as_int(hero_id != 169) * (as_int(abs(GetStat(`str`) - GetStat(`cha`)) > 4) + as_int(abs(GetStat(`dex`) - GetStat(`int`)) > 4) + as_int(abs(GetStat(`con`) - GetStat(`wis`)) > 4))

specializationDescription.original: The possibilities are nearly endless when you can reshape reality.
specializationDescription.display: 当你可以重塑现实时，可能性几乎是无穷无尽的。

description.desc: Skylla increases the effect of Whispers of Baba Yaga by $(not_buffed amount)% for each evil Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一名邪恶勇士，斯凯拉会使“雅加婆婆的低语”的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: The League of Malevolence is a cabal of odious villains united in one purpose: the accumulation of power.
specializationDescription.display: 恶念联会是一群可恶的坏蛋组成的阴谋集团，他们聚在一起只有一个目的：聚敛权力。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Whispers of Baba Yaga by $(not_buffed amount)% for each debuff that has been applied to an enemy in the current area, stacking multiplicatively and capping at $max_stacks.
每有一项减益被施加到当前区域的一名敌人身上，“雅加婆婆的低语”的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠，最多堆叠 $max_stacks 层。

specializationDescription.original: Skylla draws power from the lifeforce of her opponents.
specializationDescription.display: 斯凯拉会从她对手的生命力中汲取力量。

description.desc: Whenever an enemy that is debuffed by Faerie Fire is defeated, Skylla gains a Shimmer stack. Skylla increases the effect of Whispers of Baba Yaga by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Shimmer stack she has, stacking additively. Shimmer stacks persist for the entire adventure and reset when you complete it.
每当有一名受到精灵之火减益的敌人被击败，斯凯拉会获得一层“闪光”堆叠层数。斯凯拉每拥有一层“闪光”堆叠层数，她会使“雅加婆婆的低语”的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以加算方式堆叠。“闪光”堆叠层数在整个冒险过程会一直存在，直到你完成冒险时才会重置。

Skylla creates a twisting pattern of colors above the enemies for 15 seconds. All enemies take 5 seconds of BUD-based damage when hit by any Champion for the duration. Additionally, all enemies, including any that spawn, are Stunned for the duration or until they take damage, whichever is shorter.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: $target deals an extra 5 seconds of BUD-based damage

description.desc: 斯凯拉在敌人上方生成一个旋转的彩色图案，持续 15 秒。在此期间内，所有敌人在被任意勇士击中时，会受到等同于 5 秒基础杀招伤害的伤害。此外，所有敌人（包括任何刷新出来的敌人）会被眩晕，直到效果持续时间结束或者他们受到伤害为止，以先发生者为准。

effect_keys.override_key_desc: $target会造成等同于 5 秒基础杀招伤害的额外伤害。

description.desc: Skylla's Faerie Fire remains green, but increases the effect of the debuff by $amount%.
斯凯拉的精灵之火依然为绿色，但减益的效果提高 $amount%。

specializationDescription.original: Skylla increases the damage her opponents take when illuminated by her green Faerie Fire.
specializationDescription.display: 当斯凯拉的敌人被她的绿色精灵之火照亮时，她会使他们受到的伤害提高。

description.desc: Skylla's Faerie Fire turns blue. Champions attacking enemies affected by Faerie Fire have a $crit_hit_chance_desc% additional chance to deal a critical hit.
斯凯拉的精灵之火变成蓝色。攻击受精灵之火影响的敌人的勇士们有 $crit_hit_chance_desc% 的额外几率打出暴击。

specializationDescription.original: Skylla's Faerie Fire turns blue, leaving foes vulnerable to critical hits.
specializationDescription.display: 斯凯拉的精灵之火变成蓝色，使敌人更容易遭到暴击。

description.desc: Skylla gains the Breaker role and her Faerie Fire turns violet. Enemies affected by Faerie Fire lose an additional armor or segmented health piece when they are attacked and at least 1 segment was broken.
斯凯拉获得突破者角色定位，她的精灵之火变成蓝紫色。受精灵之火影响的敌人在被攻击并且有至少一段分段式生命值被打掉时，会额外损失一点护甲生命值或一段分段式生命值。

specializationDescription.original: Skylla's Faerie Fire turns violet, revealing flaws in the armor of her opponents.
specializationDescription.display: 斯凯拉的精灵之火变成蓝紫色，使她对手护甲的弱点暴露出来。

description.original: Good servants may keep their free will. Is that not selfless?
description.display: 好的奴才可以保留自己的自由意志。那难道不是一种无私吗？

description.original: I promise power and riches to those who serve me well.
description.display: 凡好好侍奉于我的人，我必赐予权力与财富。

description.original: Do you hear her? At the edges of your mind?
description.display: 你有听到她的声音吗？在你意识的边缘？

description.original: When all the life has left you, only her laughter will remain.
description.display: 当全部生命都离你而去，唯有她的笑声会留下。

description.original: Granny expects me to be at my very best, to do my very worst.
description.display: 奶奶希望我以最好的状态去做最坏的事。

description.original: Just where am I supposed to find baboon's blood at this hour?
description.display: 这么晚了，要我去哪里找狒狒血？

effects.description: Increases the effect of Skylla's first set of Specializations by $amount%

description.original: Now the charm is firm and good. Time for some fun.
description.display: 现在魔咒稳妥无虞了。是时候去找点乐子了。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Skylla's first set of Specializations by $amount%

character_sheet_details.backstory: The evil magic user Skylla borrows her terrible power from none other than the infamous Arch-hag and Mother of Witches, Baba Yaga. An ally of convenience, Skylla lives only for the pursuit of power and acclaim, seeing even her fellow members of the League of Malevolence as tools to be used and discarded when it suits her needs. Skylla confounds her foes with magical trickery, wielding the unpredictable chaos of the Feywild to hypnotize and incapacitate those who stand between her and her goals.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Skylla is a Support and Debuff Champion who channels the power of Baba Yaga to empower the allies in front of her. She debuffs enemies with Faerie Fire, with her power growing stronger as these marked foes fall. For a unique twist, she has a specialization that switches her allies' ability scores around.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 邪恶魔法使用者斯凯拉的可怕力量来自于臭名昭著的大鬼婆和“女巫之母”——雅加婆婆。作为一个临时的盟友，斯凯拉眼里只有力量和别人对她的赞誉，甚至将“恶念联会”的同伴都视作有需要时可以利用和抛弃的工具。斯凯拉会以魔法诡术迷惑敌人，运用妖精荒野那难以捉摸的混沌之力来催眠那些阻碍她实现自己目标的敌人，使他们失去活动能力，
character_sheet_details.system_description: 斯凯拉是一名支援和减益型勇士，会借助雅加婆婆的力量来强化她身前的盟友。她会用精灵之火来对敌人施加减益，她的力量会随着这些被标记的敌人倒下而变得愈发强大。更为独特的是，她有一项专精能调换她盟友的属性值。

original.name: Eldritch Staff
original.description: Skylla attacks a random enemy with her staff for one hit, and zaps another random enemy for 1 hit.

display.name: 魔能法杖
display.description: 斯凯拉用她的法杖攻击一名随机敌人一次，再电击另一名随机敌人一次。

original.name: Hypnotic Pattern
original.description: Skylla casts Hypnotic Pattern, making enemies take more damage from attacks and briefly stunning them.

original.name: Whispers of Baba Yaga

display.name: 绿色火焰

display.name: 无私
display.description: 好的奴才可以保留自己的自由意志。那难道不是一种无私吗？

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领
display.description: 凡好好侍奉于我的人，我必赐予权力与财富。

original.name: Dissonant Whispers
original.description: Do you hear her? At the edges of your mind?

display.description: 你有听到她的声音吗？在你意识的边缘？

original.description: When all the life has left you, only her laughter will remain.

display.description: 当全部生命都离你而去，唯有她的笑声会留下。

original.description: Just where am I supposed to find baboon's blood at this hour?

original.description: Now the charm is firm and good. Time for some fun.

display.name: 麻烦
display.description: 现在魔咒稳妥无虞了。是时候去找点乐子了。

original.name: Keen Athlete
original.description: Granny expects me to be at my very best, to do my very worst.

display.name: 热衷运动
display.description: 奶奶希望我以最好的状态去做最坏的事。
